recommendations.text: Add CLAUDE.md to improve agent context for Claude Code and similar AI coding tools
Add .cursorrules for Cursor IDE agent integration
Create llms-full.txt with complete documentation for comprehensive LLM context
Add llms.txt to repository root for code-aware agents
Add Idempotency-Key header support for safe retry patterns
Add .env.example for reproducible agent environment setup
Create Architecture Decision Records in docs/adr/ for agent-readable design context
Publish SDKs for Python, Go, and Ruby to broaden agent platform support
